item.title: Hope
item.description:
A thread to lose weight, and see a healthier version of me, v2026.6?. This is inspired from closely following Priyanka and Jason

This iteration is different from the 2021 version of weightloss. In 2021, the weightloss I did was mostly through walking 6kms a day. This really helped with bringing the metabolism, and dropping weight in 6 months. The problem was I looked skinny. This time I am trying a different route - I would be doing good amount of strength training with walking, skipping or running as cardio. I want to learn something new from this journey.

item.title: Journal
item.description:
This is accompanied with Hope

This is to maintain a daily journal of the efforts. This is to be seen from bottom to top.

To explain the jargons:

  • cw: current weight
  • gw: goal weight

Ok, lets start.

March 28, 2026

cw: 83.9

I did not do the strength training as planned - but I went out for a walk. These days I record the walk both on the Garmin watch & the Strava app.

item.title: Why I Started Tracking Everything
item.description:
Six months ago I was doing the same thing most desk-job engineers do — working long hours, sleeping at 2AM, eating inconsistently, telling myself I’d start properly “next week.”

The problem wasn’t motivation. It was system design.

I’m a systems engineer. I build immutable infrastructure for a living. I understand that a system without observability is a system you cannot debug. And yet I was running my body as a complete black box — no inputs tracked, no outputs measured, no feedback loop.

item.title: 2021 - Hope
item.description:
A thread to lose weight, and see a healthier version of me, v2021.6?. This is inspired from closely following Priyanka and Jason

In the ending months of 2020, I started with regularly doing a form of excercise be it skipping, walking, or HIIT. This has helped me lower the rest heartbeat which had increased to a high of >95. Now, after 3 months it’s down to staying in the 70 range. Somedays even staying in the 65-70 range.

item.title: Journal
item.description:
This is accompanied with Hope

This is to maintain a daily journal of the efforts. This is to be seen from bottom to top.

To explain the jargons:

  • cw: current weight
  • gw: goal weight

Ok, lets start.

March 24, 2021

cw: 73.9

A day of Freeletics. I really need to get my bicycle crunches right without hurting my neck. The first set I did it as wrong as it could be. The later ones were better. Hopefully it gets better. What I loved? Jump Squats.
